targets.rawSql: SELECT MAX(version) AS value FROM learning_versions WHERE repository = '$repository'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM learned_heuristics WHERE repository = '$repository' AND status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM prompt_patch_suggestions WHERE repository = '$repository' AND status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM review_runs rr JOIN pull_requests pr ON rr.pull_request_id = pr.id WHERE pr.repository = '$repository'
SELECT heuristic_type, agent_name, description, status, proposed_at FROM learned_heuristics WHERE repository = '$repository' ORDER BY proposed_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT agent_name, patch_type, description, status, proposed_at FROM prompt_patch_suggestions WHERE repository = '$repository' ORDER BY proposed_at DESC LIMIT 20
